Please also see Google Scholar. All articles that can be downloaded from this page are accepted versions, not final published versions.

Refereed Journal Papers

2017

  • Yiping Liu, Dunwei Gong, Jing Sun, and Yaochu Jin. A many-objective evolutionary algorithm using a one-by-one selection strategy. IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, 2017, 47(9): 2689-2702. (pdf)
    • The source code can be downloaded from here
  • Yiping Liu, Dunwei Gong, Xiaoyan Sun, and Yong Zhang. Many-objective evolutionary optimization based on reference points. Applied Soft Computing, 2017, 50(1), 344-355. (pdf)
    • The source code can be downloaded from here

  • Yiping Liu, Gary G. Yen, Dunwei Gong. Multi-modal multi-objective evolutionary optimization based on convergence and diversity analysis. IEEE Transactions on Evolutionary Computation. under review.

  • Dunwei Gong, Yiping Liu (corresponding author), Gary G. Yen. A meta-objective approach for many-objective evolutionary optimization. Evolutionary Computation. under review.

2016

  • Xiaoyan Sun, Yang Chen, Yiping Liu, and Dunwei Gong. Indicator-based set evolution particle swarm optimization for many-objective problems. Soft Computing, 2016, 20(6), 2219-2232.

2015

  • Dunwei Gong, Yiping Liu (corresponding author), Xiaoyan Sun, and Yuyan Han. Parallel many-objective evolutionary optimization based on objectives decomposition. Acta Automatica Sinica, 2015, 41(8), 1438-1451. (in Chinese) (pdf)

  • Dunwei Gong, Yiping Liu (corresponding author), Xinfang Ji, and Jing Sun. Evolutionary algorithms with user’s preferences for solving hybrid interval multi-objective optimization problems. Applied Intelligence, 2015, 43(3), 676-694. (pdf)

Refereed Conference Papers

2014

  • Yiping Liu, Dunwei Gong, Xiaoyan Sun, and Yong Zhang. A reference points-based evolutionary algorithm for many-objective optimization. Proceedings of Conference on Genetic and Evolutionary Computation, 2014, 1053-1056. (pdf)
